name: AXIS BANK MAGNUS Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Axis Bank Magnus Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of Rs 25 lakh in the preceding card anniversary year
For eligible older customers, historical waiver thresholds may differ as per Axis terms
additionalBenefits: Welcome voucher worth Rs 12,500 from eligible options such as Luxe, The Postcard Hotels or Yatra after card activation with first spend within 30 days
60 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 spent on Travel EDGE portal up to cumulative transactions of Rs 2 lakh per month
35 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 on Travel EDGE spends above cumulative transactions of Rs 2 lakh per month
12 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 on cumulative monthly spends up to Rs 1.5 lakh
35 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 on eligible incremental monthly spends above Rs 1.5 lakh, subject to product terms
Unlimited domestic and international lounge access, subject to applicable programme terms
Purchase protection up to Rs 2 lakh
Credit shield cover up to Rs 5 lakh
Travel inconvenience cover up to USD 500 for baggage and personal document loss or delay

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria for premium credit cards
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria for premium credit cards
